steps.title: Write the area equation
steps.content:
Let $w$ be the width. The length is $6w-5$, and the area is $186$ square inches.
$$w(6w-5)=186$$

steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor.
$$6w^2-5w-186=0$$
$$(6w+31)(w-6)=0$$

steps.title: Choose the positive width
steps.content: The factor $6w+31=0$ gives a negative value, which cannot be a rectangle width. The valid factor is $w-6=0$, so $w=6$. The answer is 6.
